response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong match for this Senior Fullstack Developer role. With 15+ years of professional experience and a career arc from freelance web developer to Staff Engineer, he clearly exceeds the 6-year seniority bar. His current role at re:cinq directly aligns with the JD: full-stack TypeScript/Node.js work, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP framework development. His time at Optilyz further reinforces React, AWS CDK, and MongoDB proficiency. The primary gap is the absence of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, and Kotlin is not mentioned, but his depth in TypeScript ecosystems and strong testing culture (he built testing libraries and ran TDD workshops) make these gaps easy to bridge.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq, precisely matching the JD's AI agent development requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React stack alignment backed by multiple production roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
Exceptional testing culture: authored D-language assertion and test-runner libraries, ran TDD workshops, practiced trunk-based development and CI/CD
concerns: No mention of Nest.js anywhere in the resume despite it being the primary backend framework listed in the JD
Kotlin is absent from the resume; Java appears in embedded/robotics contexts only, not in modern backend services
Vitest and Playwright are not referenced; testing experience skews toward DLang ecosystems and older Jest-adjacent tooling
